title: Amazon Web Services Solutions Architect I/II H-1B LCA 2024 | h1bdata.info
note: SA I H-1B Level I wages $110,635–$136,710 define the floor-to-midpoint base range for L2. SA II Level I at Seattle $112,474 sets the p10. New York, east coast high-cost at $195,400 defines the ceiling at SA II senior end (L3+).
